use_cases: Sticky navigation that appears when scrolling up on mobile
Floating header for dashboard and web application layouts
Navigation bar with responsive collapse behavior
Overlay header for landing pages and marketing sites
Contextual header that transforms based on scroll position
ai_summary: A floating header navigation component that provides sticky, scroll-aware navigation for web applications. Built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS, it supports hover interactions and animates based on scroll behavior. The component uses class-variance-authority for consistent styling patterns and Slot primitives for composition flexibility. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, landing pages, and web applications requiring dynamic navigation that maintains context during user scrolling.
